message:
test(cli-robot): assert semantic.*_path fields are null on not_initialized

Extend the status/health `not_initialized` contract: alongside
`status == "not_initialized"` and the human-readable summary, the
payload must also null out embedder_id, vector_index_path, model_dir,
and hnsw_path. Previously those were either absent or left pointing at
placeholder strings, which broke robot consumers that keyed off them
to decide whether to offer a "initialize semantic index" action.

No production-code change — the lib.rs output path already emits null
for these on fresh installs; this just pins the contract under test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
